name: Chocolate Tofu Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 large Container of Cool Whip (1 teaspoon vanilla)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate with 2 tablespoons water. Keep warm.
2. Blend tofu until smooth.
3. Add melted chocolate and 1 teaspoon vanilla to the blended tofu.
4. Pour mixture into crust.
5. Chill for 1-1 1/2 hours.
6. Top with Cool Whip.
